emails.subject: RE: Chairman-to-be Wood's assistant
emails.body: RE: Chairman-to-be Wood's assistant FYI. Figured you'd want to write a letter personally. Jeff To: jim.steffes@enron.com; Dasovich, Jeff; Belden, Tim

emails.subject: RE: Chairman-to-be Wood's assistant
emails.body: I absolutely could not BELIEVE that he sent this note. Unreal.

emails.subject: RE: Chairman-to-be Wood's assistant
emails.body: One never burns bridges, but geeze this guy's unbelievable. Do we want to send a message about this to anyone?

emails.subject: FW: Chairman-to-be Wood's assistant
emails.body: Oh boy. To: Kaufman, Paul; Dasovich, Jeff
